caption: A news broadcast from "PLUS POLITICS" features a male presenter and a guest connected via telephone. The presenter is a Black man wearing glasses, a dark suit, a white shirt, and a maroon tie. He appears in a studio setting with a blue digital backdrop featuring concentric circles and the "PLUS POLITICS" logo. Beside him, a smaller window displays a photo of a man in a red traditional cap, identified by on-screen text as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI POLITICAL ANALYST" from "LAGOS," under the heading "ON THE PHONE." A headline banner across the bottom reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The graphics include the "plustv" logo and links such as "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" and "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA," along with channel information for "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308." The scene remains static across the frames, with the presenter maintaining a neutral expression.
